title: Mari Discussion Speculation
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Mari Discussion/Speculation Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 25, 2009 2:16 pm Might as well since there's a thread about "Asuka's new role". There's a question I wanted to ask, anyway. Given the fact Mari is wearing a different school uniform then everybody at Shinji's school wears, do you think it's more likely that Mari is a transfer student or simply goes to a private school? Either way, it seems that the badge on her shirt is a school emblem of sorts. Also, maybe it's just me but I have the feeling she's about Kaworu's age (15) as opposed to being the same age as Shinji.

[]: Re: Mari speculation thread (since that other one was locked Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 25, 2009 2:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Might as well since there's a thread about "Asuka's new role".

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Feb 25, 2009 2:33 pm girl is crazy pigeon-toed. other than that, I got nothin'.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 25, 2009 2:42 pm Reichu wrote: You really hate me, don't you...?

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Feb 25, 2009 3:37 pm As long as Asuka is still Asuka, Mari can sprout wings and be an angel for all I care.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Feb 25, 2009 3:42 pm This is looking more and more like Girlfriend of Steel the more I read about it. New girl = Mana with more of a backbone IE Asuka-esk if you get what I'm trying to say. She pilots the new drill Eva and Shinji maybe has some feelings for her. Lets say that does happen and Rebuild IS a continuation of the past show then that would throw poor Kaworu off a little bit since she was not in the last Scenario. Just have to wait and see

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 25, 2009 4:00 pm I still like the idea of Mari being a FAR of all things (Her being an Angel would be kinda lame since that's Mayumi territory), but who knows. At the very least, it'd be interesting if she's a character that actually hates Shinji compared to how the "3 eva girls" act and feel for him.

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Feb 25, 2009 4:03 pm That would be interesting, as long as it was that she actually hated him and not the Asuka type of hating him.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 25, 2009 4:07 pm That's what I mean by Mari hating Shinji; actually hating him. Asuka for instance claims to hate Shinji but clearly she doesn't.

[]: Post by Rommel » Wed Feb 25, 2009 5:33 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: New girl = Mana with more of a backbone IE Asuka-esk if you get what I'm trying to say.

[]: Post by Dartz » Wed Feb 25, 2009 6:04 pm She looks older and more 'mature' that Asuka. Certainly on visual impression, she cuts a well rounded figure. Somehow, she reminds me of Yui... sort of what Yui would look like if she was 16 and fanart...

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 25, 2009 6:29 pm Well, there ARE apparently fan-theories that perhaps she's a younger Yui*, or even Asuka and Shinji's future daughter (Re-Take? In MY Rebuild of Eva?)... *My guess is people who think this are hoping for the sequel theory since that seems to be the only way this could work. Unless it'd be Yui somehow already borrowing the quantum psychics powers from Lilith and Adam ala EoE waaaay too early. "I dunno, lol."

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Feb 25, 2009 6:41 pm I like that theory. However unlikely.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Feb 25, 2009 6:50 pm All I know is for her to become a TRUE EVA GIRL Shinji has to be put in some highly awkward and overly sexual scenario with her at some point. With Rei there was "Oh I'm sorry, I fell and groped your naked breast and can't get up." With Asuka there was "I know you're asleep and you'll kill me but I'm gonna stick my tongue down your throat anyways...oh wait, maybe I won't." And for shnits and giggles, Kaworu had "Look upon me in the naked showers as I proclaim my love to you" Actually I take that back- Everything pertaining to Kaworu was just awkward. So what kooky pervy scenario will Anno put Shinji and "Mari" in together? Mutual showers? "Is that hair gel?" Maybe something ass based. Eva hasn;t done that yet.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 25, 2009 7:04 pm You forget about Misato wanting to SHOW Shinji THE NOOKIE in episode 23' and the EoE adult kiss, but good point. Yes, something involving Mari's ass (or Shinji's for that matter) would be amusing. I do wonder if Mari WON'T be anything special, just a regular student, and it'll just be a case of Anno trolling us. That would be amusing.

[]: Post by Axell » Wed Feb 25, 2009 7:24 pm what do you mean nothing ass based has been done? rebuild has a shot of Rei's ass they felt was needed when she puts on her plugsuit before yashima. Dont think it was in the original. All part of their more sabisu! campaign

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Feb 25, 2009 7:29 pm Theres gotta be something like that, after all "More fan service".

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Feb 25, 2009 7:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Reichu wrote: You really hate me, don't you...?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 25, 2009 7:41 pm Reichu wrote: And teenagers mature at different rates. No big deal.

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Wed Feb 25, 2009 9:03 pm They'll probably introduce some lame plot device like an EVA ACADEMY, and Mari is a cocky, self-assured, high ranks pupil from the EVA ACADEMY and probably lost her soul in the process or is a robot. And EVA ACADEMY robot.
